title: An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe
summary: An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe
whyItMatters: Treatment reasoning underpins every therapeutic decision, integrating disease context, comorbidities, medications, contraindications, and evolving biomedical knowledge to select an appropriate therapy.
